meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Advanced Client Workflow: Scale Apps with Antigravity & Claude
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end, scalable SaaS solutions for clients.
content.answer_block: To escape the 'basic app' trap, you must shift from manual coding to an automated, AI-driven architectural workflow. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic refinement, you transform your development cycle from a bottleneck into a scalable production engine, delivering enterprise-grade SaaS products with elite efficiency.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is littered with developers who treat software like a craft project rather than an industrial process. You’re stuck in the loop of building simple CRUD apps, fighting scope creep, and losing hours to boilerplate code that adds zero value to your bottom line. Your clients don't pay for your time; they pay for the speed and reliability of the solution you provide.

It’s time to move beyond the amateur approach. By adopting a high-velocity, AI-augmented workflow, you stop being a code monkey and start acting as a Lead Architect. This tutorial dissects the exact stack—Antigravity for high-level structure and Claude Code for surgical logic implementation—to help you ship production-ready applications in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the system architecture before writing a single line of code. We use Antigravity to generate high-level schemas that ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable microservices architecture for a SaaS platform including authentication, database schema, and API gateway structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project scaffolding based on the antigravity architecture schema'

steps.title: Database Schema Optimization
steps.description: Design a relational schema that prevents technical debt. We use AI to normalize data structures for high-concurrency environments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an optimized PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with row-level security policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'implement the generated database schema using Prisma ORM'

steps.title: Logic Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business logic into the scaffolded services. This step focuses on robust error handling and clean code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust service layer for user management with integrated error handling and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the user service layer using the provided business logic'

steps.title: API Contract Enforcement
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend communicate flawlessly by enforcing strict API contracts using TypeScript and Zod.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod validation schemas for all API endpoints defined in our architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'enforce API contracts across all endpoints using Zod and TypeScript'

steps.title: Automated Testing Pipeline
steps.description: Never ship broken code. Automate unit and integration tests to ensure your client's production environment remains stable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a comprehensive Jest test suite for the authentication and user service modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'execute test suite and fix any regression issues found'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context File' (.context) in your root directory to feed Claude Code your project's coding standards and style guide.
Treat your Antigravity prompts like API specifications; the more structured the input, the more deterministic the output.
Run your Claude Code sessions in short, atomic bursts to prevent the AI from hallucinating complex logic chains.
Use Git branching strategies even for solo freelance projects; it allows you to roll back AI-generated changes that introduce edge-case bugs.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' review command before every merge to ensure the AI-generated code adheres to modern security best practices.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin integrating automated deployment pipelines (CI/CD) to ensure your code moves from local to production without manual intervention.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the tools and start mastering the architecture. You have the leverage, the stack, and the roadmap to dominate your freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
